name: Spare air-cooled engine
description: Air-cooled engine pulled from a donor car during the restoration. Turns over by hand. Internal condition unknown — buyer should inspect before purchase. A solid candidate for a rebuild project.
notes: Vancouver pickup strongly preferred. Not interested in cross-border shipping.

name: Matching transmission
description: Gearbox from the same donor. Shifts through gears by hand. No idea on synchros — treat as a parts/rebuild unit unless you inspect it yourself.
notes: Can be bundled with the spare engine.

name: Drum brake set (complete)
description: Full set of period-correct drum brakes, removed when converting to discs. Hardware included. Surface rust present but all pieces are there.

name: Stock 356 wheels (set of 4)
description: Original steel wheels. Surface rust on all four, no cracks or bends. Would clean up well with sandblasting and paint. Sold as a set.

name: Front & rear suspension components
description: Assorted front and rear suspension pieces from the donor. Will list individually on request — or take the lot. Ask for a specific parts list and photos.
notes: Email with what you're looking for.
